text.title: reranking-pipeline-integration Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for reranking-pipeline-integration application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Is a reranker actually in the design AND multiple backends might be tried?

branch.conclusion: Minimal wrap with circuit breaker + fallback; skip class abstraction.

example.description: Team plans to try Cohere then move to local bge-reranker → wrap behind RerankingRAG class.
